suggestion.rationale: Test 2 (same-object test) applies: strong identity fields – project name (Grand Central Train Shed / Trainshed – minor abbreviation) and geographic scope (Grand Central) – agree. The differences in project_type (mega infrastructure vs station repair) and status (in_progress vs completed) are lifecycle variations or source-specific framings, not contradictions in identity. The name variation is a trivial spelling/abbreviation difference allowed under test 2. Per the project rules, distinct phases and lifecycle moments merge into the durable base project. Therefore, these records denote the same canonical project.
